summary: Treat D0:D5 as objectives, with D0 fixed as the pre-plan dependency-workflow and bounded integration-canvas objective. Then derive canonical ordering for D1:D5 through semantic analysis plus dependency/gap analysis, recursively reduce them into composable micro-deliverable sets, and use the last-round analysis artifacts as inputs to the PLAN skill.

objectives.title: dependency-workflow toolchain composition
objectives.description: Define the pre-plan workflow composed from SCIP, ast-grep, json-tool with CUE DAG validation, and networkx, plus a bounded non-authoritative integration repo that serves as the cross-repo indexing and validation canvas.

objectives.title: ACM policy state space and required metadata-anchor schema
objectives.description: Define the policy state space and the schema dictating required metadata anchors across manifests, schemas, and policy objects.

objectives.title: ACM shaping contract
objectives.description: Define how ACM is safely shaped through modularity, composability, adaptability, and policy object collection/hierarchy.

objectives.title: polyrepo_workspace functionality and atomics
objectives.description: Define desired workspace functionality and required atomics under ACM governance.

objectives.title: git_asset requirements surface
objectives.description: Define the constrained bootstrap/materialization requirements surface for git_asset.

objectives.title: semantic ownership and policy-evaluation closure
objectives.description: Define semantic ownership, reconciliation, controller split, and the policy evaluation DAG across ACM, polyrepo_workspace, and git_asset.

process.name: treat_D0_to_D5_as_objectives
process.result: The set is treated as an objective register, not as an execution-ready deliverable list.

process.name: fix_D0_as_preplan_objective
process.result: D0 is fixed first because semantic objective ordering depends on a defined dependency-workflow toolchain and bounded integration canvas.

process.name: derive_canonical_ordering_for_D1_to_D5
process.result: Canonical ordering for D1:D5 is derived through semantic analysis and dependency/gap analysis.

process.name: reduce_to_micro_deliverable_sets
process.result: Each ordered objective is reduced into composable sets of micro-deliverables.

process.name: analyze_each_micro_set
process.result: Each composable set receives the same semantic analysis plus dependency/gap analysis.

process.name: use_last_round_analysis_as_plan_input
process.result: The last-round set-analysis artifacts become the direct inputs to the PLAN skill.

process.name: generate_per_set_plan_packets
process.result: Individual PLAN artifacts are generated per composable set of micro-deliverables.

ordering_rule: D0 is fixed first as the dependency-workflow and bounded integration-canvas objective. PLAN packets are downstream of recursive semantic/dependency analysis, not the first artifact emitted.
